B-ANIM-0001.prompt:
Type (유형): single still frame from an animated film, Cartoon Saloon (Wolfwalkers, Song of the Sea — flat-painted, decorative) feel.
Subject (씬): an elderly baker arranging loaves at dawn, warm light from the oven.
Art style (스타일): 2D hand-painted backgrounds, cel-shaded characters, gentle film grain.
Composition (구도): cinematic intimate medium shot, soft foreground element framing the subject. Depth layered — foreground / midground / background clearly separated, atmospheric perspective.
Lighting (라이팅): candle / lantern warm glow against night.
Color palette (팔레트): cool slate, rose, butter yellow, olive.
Mood (무드): nostalgic quiet wonder.
Technical (기술): painted backgrounds in the style of high-end animation studio, subtle texture overlay (gouache / cel), character(s) integrated cleanly, no jittery linework.
Negative (금지): no text, no watermark, no ugly CGI glossy plastic, no uncanny valley faces, no photo-realistic skin, no generic anime tropes, no inconsistent light direction.
B-ANIM-0001.revised: Single still frame from a high-end European animated film with a Cartoon Saloon (Wolfwalkers / Song of the Sea) flat-painted decorative feel. Scene: an elderly baker in a small rustic bakery at dawn, carefully arranging fresh loaves on a wooden counter; warm butter-yellow light pours from the open oven behind him. Cinematic intimate medium shot, subject centered slightly off to one side; a soft out-of-focus foreground element (hanging herbs or a curtain edge) frames the shot. Clear depth layering: foreground blur, midground baker and counter, background oven, shelves, and cool night window; atmospheric perspective with gentle haze. Lighting: candle/lantern warm glow mixing with oven light against the cool slate-blue night, consistent light direction and soft shadows. Color palette: cool slate, rose accents, butter yellow highlights, olive greens in props. Art style: 2D hand-painted gouache-like backgrounds with subtle texture overlay and gentle film grain; cel-shaded character with clean integration, simplified shapes, expressive kind face (not uncanny), no jittery linework. Mood: nostalgic quiet wonder. Negative: no text, no watermark, no glossy CGI/plastic look, no photorealistic skin, no generic anime tropes, no inconsistent lighting.

B-ANIM-0002.prompt:
Type (유형): single still frame from an animated film, Disney hand-drawn classic era (Lilo & Stitch watercolor backgrounds) feel.
Subject (씬): a lone samurai resting under a flowering plum tree in light snow.
Art style (스타일): gouache poster-style illustration, visible brush strokes.
Composition (구도): cinematic intimate medium shot, soft foreground element framing the subject. Depth layered — foreground / midground / background clearly separated, atmospheric perspective.
Lighting (라이팅): stormy overcast with rim-light accents.
Color palette (팔레트): cool slate, rose, butter yellow, olive.
Mood (무드): contemplative solitude before a journey.
Technical (기술): painted backgrounds in the style of high-end animation studio, subtle texture overlay (gouache / cel), character(s) integrated cleanly, no jittery linework.
Negative (금지): no text, no watermark, no ugly CGI glossy plastic, no uncanny valley faces, no photo-realistic skin, no generic anime tropes, no inconsistent light direction.
B-ANIM-0002.revised: Single still frame from a hand-drawn animated film with classic Disney-era feel and watercolor background sensibility reminiscent of Lilo & Stitch. Scene: a lone samurai resting beneath a flowering plum tree during light snowfall, contemplative solitude before a journey. Gouache poster-style illustration with visible brush strokes; subtle gouache/cel texture overlay. Cinematic intimate medium shot; soft out-of-focus foreground element (e.g., snowy branch or tall grass) framing the subject; strong depth layering with clear foreground/midground/background separation and atmospheric perspective. Lighting: stormy overcast sky with subtle rim-light accents on the samurai and plum blossoms; consistent light direction. Color palette: cool slate blues/greys, rose pink blossoms, butter yellow highlights, muted olive greens. Painted high-end animation background; character integrated cleanly with smooth, confident linework (not jittery). No text, no watermark, no glossy CGI/plastic look, no uncanny valley, no photoreal skin, no generic anime tropes.

Lighting (라이팅): candle / lantern warm glow against night.
Color palette (팔레트): forest green, moss, terracotta, fog gray.
Mood (무드): nostalgic quiet wonder.

B-ANIM-0003.revised: Single still frame from a high-end animated film with a flat-painted, decorative Cartoon Saloon (Wolfwalkers / Song of the Sea) feel. Scene: a teen astronaut (friendly, stylized face, not realistic) leaning against a lunar rover on the Moon; Earth small but vivid in the distant sky. Composition: cinematic dutch-tilt dynamic angle, layered depth with clear foreground/midground/background separation; subtle atmospheric perspective with fog-gray lunar dust haze. Lighting: warm candle/lantern glow from a small lantern mounted on the rover, casting soft terracotta highlights against the cool night; consistent light direction. Art style: flat graphic shapes, decorative patterns and subtle Celtic knot-like details integrated into suit patches, rover panels, and shadow shapes; painterly gouache/cel texture overlay, clean integration, no jittery linework. Mood: nostalgic quiet wonder. Negative: no text, no watermark, no glossy CGI plastic look, no uncanny valley faces, no photo-realistic skin, no generic anime tropes, no inconsistent lighting.
